subcodes.title: Answer to one of the relatives
subcodes.first_line: O thou revered point of adoration, may thy grace endure! I have perused the verses inscribed upon two sacred pages, and the Arabic portion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الله تعالی. قبله محترم دام فضلکم تلاوت ایات دو ورقه خط شریف را نموده صفحه عربی بجهة
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @limits of the intellect, @humility; meekness; lowliness
